  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "Rekopel Resources Limited - Our client is a new entrant in the hotel business, with its new ultra modern hotel.

They are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Lagos

Job Description
Our client requires the services of an experience Front Desk Manager whom should have passed hrough the cadre from &nbsp;Front Desk Manager in their previous employment &nbsp;to be responsible for:


	Train, cross train and retrain all front office staff and manage working relationship and communicate with all departments.
	Shall be responsible for the training of the front office staff as outlined in the front office procedure
	Conduct regularly scheduled meeting of front office staff check cashiers in and out and verify all deposits at each shift
	Ensure guest satisfaction and overall efficiency of the front office operations
	Verify accurate room status information and resolve guest problems efficiently and courteously
	Comply with legal requirement on lodging property and manage guest expectation&nbsp;
	Supervising and guiding the front office team and coordinating the team&nbsp;&nbsp;work schedule
	Ensure that front office personnel, properly completes all from office duties
	Directs and conducts the activities of the front office reservation and guest services
	Inspect the all vacant clean room by housekeeping department to be sure that the room meet up with the hotel standard.
	Prepares monthly reports and budget for the front office operations
	Ideal candidate must be computer literate.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: christybosed123@gmail.com using the Job Position as subject of email.",

Front Desk Officer Job at Rekopel Resources Limited




        
    

        
        Rekopel Resources Limited - Our client is a new entrant in the hotel business, with its new ultra modern hotel.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Lagos

Job Description
Our client requires the services of an experience Front Desk Manager whom should have passed hrough the cadre from  Front Desk Manager in their previous employment  to be responsible for:
     

            
    




	Train, cross train and retrain all front office staff and manage working relationship and communicate with all departments.
	Shall be responsible for the training of the front office staff as outlined in the front office procedure
	Conduct regularly scheduled meeting of front office staff check cashiers in and out and verify all deposits at each shift
	Ensure guest satisfaction and overall efficiency of the front office operations
	Verify accurate room status information and resolve guest problems efficiently and courteously
	Comply with legal requirement on lodging property and manage guest expectation 
	Supervising and guiding the front office team and coordinating the team  work schedule
	Ensure that front office personnel, properly completes all from office duties
	Directs and conducts the activities of the front office reservation and guest services
	Inspect the all vacant clean room by housekeeping department to be sure that the room meet up with the hotel standard.
	Prepares monthly reports and budget for the front office operations
	Ideal candidate must be computer literate.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Compliance Analyst Job at Aiteo




        
    

        
        Aiteo is one of Africa's fastest-growing energy leaders. We are an integrated energy group with a clear vision for the future and the experience and assets necessary to provide oil and gas on a regional and global scale. We discover, produce, store and deliver energy resources to marketplaces worldwide.

We are working on opportunities to responsibly develop energy resources in some of the world's most significant basins, including the huge potential of the Niger Delta basin in West Africa's offshore fields, and of the Benue Trough.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Compliance Analyst

Job Location: Lagos, Nigeria

Description
     

            
    




	Are you passionate about governance, ethics, risk management, and regulatory compliance? We are expanding our team and are looking for experienced and motivated professionals to join us in driving a strong culture of compliance and corporate integrity.


Requirement


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications


Why Join Us?


	Work in a dynamic and collaborative environment.
	Opportunity to contribute to a high-performing compliance function.
	Competitive remuneration and benefits.
	Professional growth and career development opportunities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to [email protected] using "Compliance Manager – Lagos" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Engagement Officer",
  "description": "AXA Mansard is one of the foremost Financial Institutions in Nigeria, that has been offering world class financial services over the years.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Engagement Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time
Entity: Health

Job Description


	The Customer Engagement Officer is responsible for driving superior enrollee engagement and service experience across all communication channels.
	The role ensures prompt, data-informed resolution of customer issues, proactive engagement, and continuous improvement initiatives.
	The officer leverages data analytics, customer insights, and basic project management capabilities to enhance service quality, track utilization trends, and support product and process optimization within the Company.


Key Responsibilities


	Serve as the primary point of engagement for enrollees across digital, email, phone, and social channels.
	Respond to customer enquiries promptly and professionally, ensuring adherence to service standards.
	Monitor customer feedback and escalate service issues where necessary.
	Maintain a strong understanding of HMO plans, provider networks, benefits, exclusions, and service processes.
	Track and analyse customer engagement trends, service patterns, customer pain points, and utilisation behaviour.
	Generate weekly and monthly customer experience dashboards using Excel or analytical tools.
	Support root-cause analyses for complaints, service gaps, and recurring operational issues.
	Provide insights to Product, Claims, Underwriting, and Provider Management teams to support decision-making.
	Support the implementation of customer-centric projects and service improvement initiatives.
	Document project milestones, follow up with stakeholders, and monitor progress against timelines.
	Participate in cross-functional working groups to improve claims turnaround time, onboarding, and communication flows.
	Assist in testing and deploying customer-facing digital solutions.
	Manage customer interactions across social platforms and digital channels in alignment with brand standards.
	Collaborate with Marketing to ensure consistency of messaging and timely publication of service-related updates.
	Monitor and moderate online customer conversations to ensure accuracy and remove inappropriate content.


Requirements
Academic / Professional Qualification:


	First Degree in Business Administration, Economics, Statistics, Marketing, or any related discipline.
	Certification in Customer Experience, Data Analytics, or Project Management (added advantage).


Work Experience:


	2&ndash;4 years of experience in customer service, customer engagement, or related function.
	Experience in an HMO, insurance, healthcare, telecoms, or similar service industry is an advantage.
	Practical experience with data analysis and reporting tools.


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Data analytics and insight generation (Excel, dashboards, basic analytics tools).
	Customer engagement &amp; service management.
	Basic project management (scheduling, follow-up, documentation).
	Knowledge of HMO products, benefits, and healthcare processes.
	Strong written and verbal communication.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
	High emotional intelligence and strong interpersonal skills.
	Problem-solving and critical thinking abilities.
	Attention to detail and organisational skills.
	Strong initiative and ability to work independently.
	Professionalism, integrity, and strong work ethic.
	Ability to learn quickly and adapt in a fast-paced environment.

Customer Engagement Officer Job at AXA Mansard




        
    

        
        AXA Mansard is one of the foremost Financial Institutions in Nigeria, that has been offering world class financial services over the years.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Engagement Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time
Entity: Health

Job Description
     

            
    




	The Customer Engagement Officer is responsible for driving superior enrollee engagement and service experience across all communication channels.
	The role ensures prompt, data-informed resolution of customer issues, proactive engagement, and continuous improvement initiatives.
	The officer leverages data analytics, customer insights, and basic project management capabilities to enhance service quality, track utilization trends, and support product and process optimization within the Company.


Key Responsibilities


	Serve as the primary point of engagement for enrollees across digital, email, phone, and social channels.
	Respond to customer enquiries promptly and professionally, ensuring adherence to service standards.
	Monitor customer feedback and escalate service issues where necessary.
	Maintain a strong understanding of HMO plans, provider networks, benefits, exclusions, and service processes.
	Track and analyse customer engagement trends, service patterns, customer pain points, and utilisation behaviour.
	Generate weekly and monthly customer experience dashboards using Excel or analytical tools.
	Support root-cause analyses for complaints, service gaps, and recurring operational issues.
	Provide insights to Product, Claims, Underwriting, and Provider Management teams to support decision-making.
	Support the implementation of customer-centric projects and service improvement initiatives.
	Document project milestones, follow up with stakeholders, and monitor progress against timelines.
	Participate in cross-functional working groups to improve claims turnaround time, onboarding, and communication flows.
	Assist in testing and deploying customer-facing digital solutions.
	Manage customer interactions across social platforms and digital channels in alignment with brand standards.
	Collaborate with Marketing to ensure consistency of messaging and timely publication of service-related updates.
	Monitor and moderate online customer conversations to ensure accuracy and remove inappropriate content.


Requirements
Academic / Professional Qualification:


	First Degree in Business Administration, Economics, Statistics, Marketing, or any related discipline.
	Certification in Customer Experience, Data Analytics, or Project Management (added advantage).


Work Experience:


	2–4 years of experience in customer service, customer engagement, or related function.
	Experience in an HMO, insurance, healthcare, telecoms, or similar service industry is an advantage.
	Practical experience with data analysis and reporting tools.


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Data analytics and insight generation (Excel, dashboards, basic analytics tools).
	Customer engagement & service management.
	Basic project management (scheduling, follow-up, documentation).
	Knowledge of HMO products, benefits, and healthcare processes.
	Strong written and verbal communication.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
	High emotional intelligence and strong interpersonal skills.
	Problem-solving and critical thinking abilities.
	Attention to detail and organisational skills.
	Strong initiative and ability to work independently.
	Professionalism, integrity, and strong work ethic.
	Ability to learn quickly and adapt in a fast-paced environment.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Social Media Manager Job at  Meliah Nails Experience




        
    

        
         Meliah Nails Experience is a luxury nail salon and self-care brand located on the 2nd floor of The Lennox Mall, 3 Admiralty Way, Lekki Phase 1, Lagos. Known as a home for BIAB (Builder in a Bottle) and Gel-X, it offers premium manicures, pedicures, intricate nail art, and signature honey shea butter hand massages.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	We're looking for a strategic and creative thinker to manage our online presence, grow our community and elevate the MELIAH brand across all platforms.


You Will
     

            
    




	Develop and execute social media strategies that drive growth
	Create, schedule, and publish engaging content across all platforms
	Manage community engagement and respond to messages
	Analyse performance and provide insights to improve results
	Stay up to date with trends and industry best practices


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a relevant experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV/Portfolio and a short cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: Front Desk Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Job Description
Our client requires the services of an experience Front Desk Manager whom should have passed hrough the cadre from &nbsp;Front Desk Manager in their previous employment &nbsp;to be responsible for:


	Train, cross train and retrain all front office staff and manage working relationship and communicate with all departments.

	Conduct regularly scheduled meeting of front office staff check cashiers in and out and verify all deposits at each shift

	Directs and conducts the activities of the front office reservation and guest services
	Inspect the all vacant clean room by housekeeping department to be sure that the room meet up with the hotel standard.
	Prepares monthly reports and budget for the front office operations
	Ideal candidate must be computer literate.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: christybosed123@gmail.com using the Job Position as subject of email.",

Front Desk Manager Job at Rekopel Resources Limited




        
    

        
        Rekopel Resources Limited - Our client is a new entrant in the hotel hotel business, with it's new ultra modern hotel.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Job Description
Our client requires the services of an experience Front Desk Manager whom should have passed hrough the cadre from  Front Desk Manager in their previous employment  to be responsible for:
     

            
    




	Train, cross train and retrain all front office staff and manage working relationship and communicate with all departments.
	Shall be responsible for the training of the front office staff as outlined in the front office procedure
	Conduct regularly scheduled meeting of front office staff check cashiers in and out and verify all deposits at each shift
	Ensure guest satisfaction and overall efficiency of the front office operations
	Verify accurate room status information and resolve guest problems efficiently and courteously
	Comply with legal requirement on lodging property and manage guest expectation 
	Supervising and guiding the front office team and coordinating the team work schedule
	Ensure that front office personnel, properly completes all from office duties
	Directs and conducts the activities of the front office reservation and guest services
	Inspect the all vacant clean room by housekeeping department to be sure that the room meet up with the hotel standard.
	Prepares monthly reports and budget for the front office operations
	Ideal candidate must be computer literate.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
